ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sailing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the sailing event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sailing event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for boat and sailor registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sailno" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the boat */,
  "hcap" REAL /* Handicap of the boat */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the boat */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the boat was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the boat in meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES boat_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "sailor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the sailor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sailor */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the sailor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the sailor */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_boats" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing event */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat participating in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sailors" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing event */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor participating in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_sailors" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor associated with the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id", "sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing event the race belongs to */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "course" TEXT /* Description of the race course */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sailing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the result belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish time of the boat */,
  "elapsed" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the boat */,
  "corrected" TEXT /* Corrected time of the boat */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the boat in the race */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the boat in the race */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties incurred by the boat in the race */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing event the ranking belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the boat in the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the boat */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the boat in the event */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points per race */,
  "best_race" INTEGER /* ID of the best race for the boat */,
  "worst_race" INTEGER /* ID of the worst race for the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sailing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sailor, spectator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_messages" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing event */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_type_boats" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat type */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat associated with the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "boat_id")
)
